chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Misc. Application No.775 of 2024 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of M.A. No.9968/2024 --------------------------------------- 20.05.2025 Mr. Muhammad Yousuf Narejo, advocate for applicant Ms. Amna Ansari, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh ADIGP Legal Karachi Range Asif Ali Jakhrani, SSP Investigation South Syed Ali Hassan, PI Sajjad I/C Legal, SIP Aziz Ahmed of PS Gizri ------------------------------------------------- In terms of order dated 01.08.2024, Additional Inspector General of Police Sindh was directed to conduct inquiry/probe into the matter and if it is proved that SHO PS Gizri and other police officials are guilty then appropriate action shall be taken against them in accordance with law. Today, Additional Inspector General of Police Sindh (Legal) Karachi Range has furnished compliance report, which reveals that, “during course of enquiry, it has been established that investigation of case FIR No.348/2024, under sections 342, 371-, 372-B, 34, PPC was not conducted properly by the concerned IO, instead of utilizing the evidence, IO deliberately wasted all the evidence and conducted defective investigation and also effected the investigation with intention of providing benefit to the accused.” Inspector General of Police Sindh is directed not to post the IO of FIR No.348/2024 in the Investigation Branch in future.

Amna Ansari, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh ADIGP Legal Karachi Range Asif Ali Jakhrani, SSP Investigation South Syed Ali Hassan, PI Sajjad I/C Legal, SIP Aziz Ahmed of PS Gizri ------------------------------------------------- In terms of order dated 01.08.2024, Additional Inspector General of Police Sindh was directed to conduct inquiry/probe into the matter and if it is proved that SHO PS Gizri and other police officials are guilty then appropriate action shall be taken against them in accordance with law. Today, Additional Inspector General of Police Sindh (Legal) Karachi Range has furnished compliance report, which reveals that, “during course of enquiry, it has been established that investigation of case FIR No.348/2024, under sections 342, 371-, 372-B, 34, PPC was not conducted properly by the concerned IO, instead of utilizing the evidence, IO deliberately wasted all the evidence and conducted defective investigation and also effected the investigation with intention of providing benefit to the accused.” Inspector General of Police Sindh is directed not to post the IO of FIR No.348/2024 in the Investigation Branch in future. Additional Inspector General of Police Sindh (Legal) submits that applicant Tanveer Murad was not involved in any misconduct. In view of such position, counsel for applicant submits that the grievance of applicant has been redressed, therefore, he does not press the instant criminal miscellaneous application, which is accordingly dismissed. However, police officials concerned are directed to act strictly in accordance with law. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
